activities.title: Opening Reflection — Business Engine Debrief
activities.description: Capture biggest insight, surprise, and one improvement from yesterday's Business Engine workshop.
activities.deliverable: Opening reflection in Growth Engine worksheet

activities.title: Growth Engine Canvas Workshop
activities.description: Complete Growth Engine Canvas — leaders, systems, capacity, market, long-term vision. Update FEC Box 6.
activities.deliverable: Growth Engine Canvas + FEC three-year narrative

activities.title: Business Growth Targets
activities.description: Calculate Year 1 revenue goal, required clients, monthly targets, and weekly 10–5–3–1 activity funnel.

activities.title: Squad Stress Test
activities.description: Squads review each member's numbers, challenge assumptions, and suggest improvements.
activities.deliverable: Revised growth targets and strategy notes

activities.title: Venture Pitch Preparation
activities.description: Pitch readiness checklist and peer feedback on revenue goal, clients, growth strategy, and capacity plan.
